data.content: Implementation review blocked: the rollbackBeatState change matches the knot requirements and focused tests pass, but required sanity gates cannot pass because unrelated files contain unresolved merge-conflict markers (for example src/components/beat-columns.tsx, src/components/cascade-close-dialog.tsx, src/components/dep-tree.tsx, src/components/relationship-picker.tsx, src/components/retakes-view.tsx, and src/components/wave-planner.tsx). Resolve those conflicts and rerun lint, typecheck, and build before resubmitting.
